thread.title: ABSOLUTELY NOT! Democratic Senator Peter Welch Wants to Restore Funding for Terror-Loving UNRWA
thread.title_full: ABSOLUTELY NOT! Democratic Senator Peter Welch Wants to Restore Funding for Terror-Loving UNRWA

author: Amy Curtis
title: ABSOLUTELY NOT! Democratic Senator Peter Welch Wants to Restore Funding for Terror-Loving UNRWA
text:
A few months ago, this writer told you how the UNRWA -- a corrupt, feckless arm of the even more corrupt and feckless United Nations -- [was caught stealing and selling humanitarian aid meant for Gaza](https://twitchy.com/amy-curtis/2024/05/08/unrwa-caught-stealing-humanitarian-aid-for-gaza-n2396038). [They called Hamas a 'political movement'](https://twitchy.com/amy-curtis/2024/02/15/morally-compromised-bureaucrat-watch-what-un-relief-chief-says-about-hamas-n2392973) (it's designated a terror group by several nations) and somehow got nominated for a Nobel Peace Prize (as if that award could get any less meaningless).
The UNRWA was up to its elbows in the October 7, 2023 terror attack. So much so even the Biden administration couldn't [ignore its involvement and cut off funding](https://twitchy.com/brettt/2024/01/27/us-defunds-unrwa-after-staffers-involvement-with-october-7-revealed-n2392262).
Now Senator Peter Welch, Democrat from Vermont, wants to give the UNRWA funding again:
Today, I'm introduced legislation today with my colleagues to restore funding to UNRWA.
— Senator Peter Welch (@SenPeterWelch)
Given the intensifying humanitarian crisis in Gaza, we must give the most effective aid organization in the region the resources they need to save civilian lives.[pic.twitter.com/Zx0GQ13Bs7][November 21, 2024]
Absolutely not.
You are literally f**king defending and funding terrorists
— marilyn maupin (@marilynmaupin)[November 22, 2024]
Yes they are.
Nope. You’re supporting terrorists, dummy.
— The Panic (@ThePanic16)[November 22, 2024]
He's not too bright.
The pronouns in the bio were a clue, we guess.
You support the murder of Jews
— Fusilli Spock (@awstar11)[https://t.co/UC6JVQoygi][November 22, 2024]
Not only the murder of Jews, but the stealing of aid meant for Gaza.
UNRWA is a subsidiary of Hamas, a designated terrorist organization. Under 18 U.S. Code § 2339B, it's a felony to provide resources to such an organization.
— Area Man (@lheal)[https://t.co/dgxjLRMz6G][November 22, 2024]
Recommended
We hope the next AG will charge him with a crime if they fund this.
What do you mean by "Most effective", Senator?
— Extremely Careless (@Shanghaibeast)[https://t.co/bEEFE3R6Xx][November 22, 2024]
Most effective way to give money to terrorists.
UNWRA is a paper-thin veneer over full support for terrorists and terrorism. You're either blitheringly stupid for believing it or wholly complicit in supporting their goals of killing Jews.
— BlimpCo Omniversal (@Blimp_Co2)
Which are you?[November 22, 2024]
You tell us, Senator.
Hell no
— Pradheep J. Shanker, M.D. (@neoavatara)
Cut all finding.[https://t.co/hHcgCosLBl][November 22, 2024]
If this writer ever ran for POTUS, she would include defunding the UN and expelling it from the property in lower Manhattan.
Absolutely not.
— Stephen L. Miller (@redsteeze)[https://t.co/BxQsqxnPnL][November 22, 2024]
Not a chance in hell.
There's "no".
— john jackson (@pvtjokerus)
There's "hell no".
Then there's this.
NO. FKN. WAY.[https://t.co/5hUh04Qb7H][November 22, 2024]
THIS.
Welch introduces a resolution for an arms embargo on Israel.
— Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)
Welch introduces a resolution to fund Hamas fighters.[https://t.co/MRJ2ecvLxD][pic.twitter.com/rqvYpkRbM1][November 22, 2024]
One could draw the logical conclusion that Welch hates Jews.
Is there something in the water in Vermont that they keep electing crackpots to the Senate? Serious question.
— Boris Ryvkin (@BRyvkin)[https://t.co/Ff9Ggii4TI][November 22, 2024]
We should look into that, because damn, Vermont.
The day after there’s a trove of evidence demonstrating UNRWA support and complicity with Hamas, senators decide we need more of that? 🤦♂️
— Scott Bernstein (@xsandman00)[https://t.co/3XewR98ipE][https://t.co/yK4WSDlZUo][November 22, 2024]
Make it make sense.
